context_for_next_testing_agent: Both shipping progress bar features are working correctly: 1) CartPage progress bar updates when quantity changes due to cart.total dependency in useEffect 2) FoodMyCartPage shows separate progress bars for each store with independent calculations. Free delivery threshold is 150,000 SYP for products and 50,000 SYP for food.
